title: Wapol’s Men Lurk Outside
description: On pages 11–13, this part focuses on wapol’s men lurk outside, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: Wapol’s Men Lurk Outside. Hiriluk reaches out to Chopper and gives him a place to belong, while Drum Kingdom’s cruelty remains in the background. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: That's right! This skull here laughs at the impossible!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: It's a symbol of unwavering conviction!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: With this flag, I shall fight on like a true pirate!

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: The seas are full of proud men called Pirates!

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: You should venture the seas one day too! Then you'll realize how small your worries are!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Cross my heart and hope to die.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: This island is as small as the circle I'm making when compared to the world.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: No wait! It's more like this small!

dialogue.speaker: Chess
dialogue.text: Chopperr, just go and rest back home.

dialogue.speaker: Kuromarimo
dialogue.text: I don't want you come crying to me when your wounds reopen because of your carelessness.

dialogue.speaker: Kuromarimo
dialogue.text: That's for your wounds to decide, not you!

dialogue.speaker: Kuromarimo
dialogue.text: I hear Robert is urgently in need of a doctor so I've got to take off.

dialogue.speaker: Hiriluk
dialogue.text: What's with the lack of guards these days?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Well... you see, sir, most of us have been busy mushroom-hunting under MD-20's orders...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Yes, apparently there's some rare mushroom in this kingdom,

dialogue.speaker: Kuromarimo
dialogue.text: that can be used to prepare some sort of panacea...

dialogue.speaker: Kuromarimo
dialogue.text: Well aren't I in luck? With so little guards, this job should be a cinch.

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Damn it, I thought the lizard- eyeball would've worked for sure...!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Don't be so damn stingy, you filthy Rich pig!

summary: This part highlights wapol’s men lurk outside and moves the chapter forward through its central emotional or plot turn.
